ksa_text: Knowledge of reference data management principles, including reference data taxonomy design, governance of controlled vocabularies, change management for reference data updates, and maintaining consistency across reference datasets.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of collection systems, capabilities, and processes.

nice.top_element_label: Identify the types of information to be processed, stored, or transmitted by a system

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-010 (Data Quality/Knowledge) scores 0.426 composite (highest: NICE at 0.426) and is edge_case for the Data Engineer role. The KSA is an edge case for Data Quality but contains 0 DE pattern signals sufficient to warrant inclusion for a senior IC data engineer. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NICE signal (0.426), and Data Quality handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does NICE signal (0.426) for this Data Quality KSA reflect actual Data Engineer hiring requirements?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in 60-85% of senior Data Engineer job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at IC-to-senior IC level across major platforms.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.426 is market-validated for Data Engineer IC/senior IC. Final decision: include.
